hyperedges.label: Cadena Insight→Compromiso→Regla→Seguimiento→Verificación→Refuerzo
Mecanismo de entrega de eventos (outbox durable + fast-path síncrono)
Frontera anti-poisoning de memoria (LLM propone, datos confirman)
Behavior Loop Rules Enforcement (loop → rules → blocking)
TD-018 Trade Service Extraction
AI Provider Resolution Flow (persisted key → env → none)
Cutover G2 de reglas (automations → rules)
Loop de mejora de comportamiento (insight → compromiso → regla → verificación → refuerzo → índice)
Compañero cognitivo v3.2 (quinto eje: memoria visible + cierre del bucle con el trader)
Prop-Firm Rule Engine Pipeline
Snapshot Preset Application Flow
POST-6 QA Closure Blockers (a/b/c)
Secuencia de tasks del retiro de automations (G2 fase 2)
Flujo de enforcement de reglas post-G2 (trades → runRules → evaluate/runAction)
Service layer de trades TD-018 (serializers, embedding, dashboard, read, write)
CI/CD antierrores pipeline

nodes.rationale: Single consolidated per-milestone history; verbose per-sprint detail was removed in the 2026-07-09 docs consolidation and lives in git history.

nodes.label: TD-018 — Trade Services Extracted from trades Router (2026-07-14, PR #130)

nodes.label: G2 — Rules Cutover: rules Is the Only Source (2026-07-13)
nodes.rationale: Closes gate G2 (C6/FREEZE-D8). Phase 1 (flip RULES_SOURCE=rules) verified in prod by direct observation (rules.last_fired_at bump, automations quiet); phase 2 landed on branch feat/g2-rules-cutover.
nodes.norm_label: g2 — rules cutover: rules is the only source (2026-07-13)

nodes.label: Hardening: P&L, Enforcement, CI/Migrations and Performance (2026-06-10, PRs #6–#17)

nodes.label: trades.ts Router Slimdown (1146 → 180 LOC)
nodes.rationale: Router reduced to zod schemas plus delegation; tRPC contract (RouterOutputs) unchanged.

nodes.label: First Direct dashboardStats Test (practice partition)
nodes.rationale: Documents by test the practice partition: financial excludes DEMO/BACKTEST, discipline counts them, explicit account wins.

nodes.label: Rules Engine Enforcement (runRules-only)
nodes.rationale: runAutomations, the dispatcher and the RULES_SOURCE flag were retired so rules created by the behavior loop (commitment→rule) truly block.

nodes.label: /reglas Edits rules — Executable Parity Router (builder, merged templates, reorder, badges)
nodes.rationale: Loop-created rules become visible with origin badge and mode badge reading rule.mode; closes OI-5.1 and S1/DT-5.
nodes.norm_label: /reglas edits rules — executable parity router (builder, merged templates, reorder, badges)

nodes.label: automations Table Archived
nodes.rationale: Table and model kept intact (P9) with no reads or writes; router, dual-write and migration report retired.

nodes.label: /api/cron/rules-migration-report (retired)
nodes.rationale: Purpose fulfilled by the OI-1 triage over real data.

nodes.label: P&L Point Value Fix on Manual Close (#14)
nodes.rationale: An NQ trade showed +$99.40 instead of +$1,988 (×$20). computeClosedTradePnl/computeRMultiple now receive pointValue (default 1); close mutation resolves it from the markets catalog. CSV import unaffected (uses broker P&L). Trades closed before the fix keep old pnl (would need recompute).
nodes.norm_label: p&l point value fix on manual close (#14)

nodes.label: Temporal Locks No Longer Offer Manual Unlock (#17)
nodes.rationale: Unlocking a daily/weekly/monthly lock re-locked instantly; now they show they reactivate on period renewal, and manual unlock is only for permanent locks.
nodes.norm_label: temporal locks no longer offer manual unlock (#17)

nodes.label: Onboarding Fix Batch (#10)
nodes.rationale: Markets seeded also from Trades, theme toggle hydration, markets.create duplicate → 409 + toast, inline Script warning, truncated balance, loading states in trade modal, fractional futures contract notice.

nodes.label: Service Worker Excluded from Auth Middleware Matcher (#8)
nodes.norm_label: service worker excluded from auth middleware matcher (#8)

nodes.label: QueryClient staleTime 30s + no refetch-on-focus + retry 1 (#10)
nodes.rationale: Previously every navigation refetched all queries.

nodes.rationale: The toolchain does not start on Node 18.

nodes.rationale: Missing user_ai_settings broke CI db reset.

nodes.label: 21 P0 QA Findings Resolved
nodes.rationale: Archived accounts excluded from dashboard, custom tags in trade form, discipline score with 0 trades, withdrawal ≤ balance validation, dead-button navigation, etc.

nodes.label: Formula Engine (Sprint 1)
nodes.rationale: Included formula specification, resolution decisions and an audit of win-rate sites.

nodes.label: Learning System (spaced repetition, decay detection, materialized streak, email idempotency)
nodes.norm_label: learning system (spaced repetition, decay detection, materialized streak, email idempotency)

nodes.label: Trading Journal (project)
nodes.rationale: Not a glorified spreadsheet or metrics app: a system that observes, understands, intervenes and teaches — captures trades, reveals behavior patterns, interrupts in the moment, enforces rules and measures improvement.

nodes.label: Cognitive Layer Thesis (v3)
nodes.rationale: v3 turned the journal (v2: capture + analytics) into a cognitive layer that changes trader behavior; the unit of value became 'the verified behavior change', not 'the logged trade'. Guiding principle: every screen serves a function; no chart that doesn't produce a decision; every insight ends in an action. Design built the brain before the skin: pure tested logic landed invisible, UI made it observable later.

nodes.label: Behavior Loop (Insight → Compromiso → Regla → Verificación → Refuerzo → Trade)
nodes.norm_label: behavior loop (insight → compromiso → regla → verificacion → refuerzo → trade)

nodes.label: Behavior Engine
nodes.rationale: An insight becomes a measurable commitment, shieldable with a pre-trade blocking rule; the system verifies at window close and reinforces (variable ratio). Turns 'you should trade less' into something the system measures and enforces.

nodes.label: AI Coach
nodes.rationale: Proposes rules and commitments only with user permission (propose_rule / propose_commitment); runs via Claude / OpenAI / OpenRouter.

nodes.label: 4-Layer Hierarchical Memory (episodic pgvector · semantic · identity · improvement)
nodes.norm_label: 4-layer hierarchical memory (episodic pgvector · semantic · identity · improvement)

nodes.label: Intervention Engine (deterministic)
nodes.rationale: Deterministic motor (loss cascade · revenge · oversizing · drawdown + scoring + fatigue) with fast-path on trade close (≤2s); interrupts at the moment of error; accepting the intervention creates a protective rule.

nodes.label: Institutional Analytics (drawdown, R distribution, Sortino/Calmar/Kelly, MAE/MFE, benchmark, heatmap)
nodes.norm_label: institutional analytics (drawdown, r distribution, sortino/calmar/kelly, mae/mfe, benchmark, heatmap)

nodes.label: Bayesian Confidence Bands (shrinkage estimator)
nodes.rationale: Statistical honesty: 30 trades are not '57% win rate', they are an estimate with uncertainty.

nodes.label: Risk & Prop (ruin risk analytic + Monte Carlo, phase-pass projection, daily budget, multi-account correlation, withdrawal policy)
nodes.rationale: Answers 'how much can I risk today without blowing the account?' — everything in bands.
nodes.norm_label: risk & prop (ruin risk analytic + monte carlo, phase-pass projection, daily budget, multi-account correlation, withdrawal policy)

nodes.label: Playbook Intelligence (edge decay with Welch significance, definition-vs-execution drift, rolling-window evolution, A/B variants)
nodes.rationale: Warns when a setup that used to work starts to die.
nodes.norm_label: playbook intelligence (edge decay with welch significance, definition-vs-execution drift, rolling-window evolution, a/b variants)

nodes.label: Learning & Transfer (edge by instrument/tag, study↔trading transfer, performance-adapted SRS, error cards)
nodes.rationale: Transfer is association, never cause.
nodes.norm_label: learning & transfer (edge by instrument/tag, study↔trading transfer, performance-adapted srs, error cards)

nodes.label: ImprovementScore (North Star, composite 0–100)
nodes.rationale: Composite index with actionable drivers, temporal curve ('vs N days ago') and cost of indiscipline.

nodes.label: 5 Cognitive Surfaces (HOY · OPERAR · ANALIZAR · PROTEGER · MEJORAR)
nodes.rationale: Reorganized by what the trader does, not by tables.
nodes.norm_label: 5 cognitive surfaces (hoy · operar · analizar · proteger · mejorar)

nodes.label: tj.v3Shell Feature Flag
nodes.rationale: OFF = navigation identical to v2.

nodes.label: PROJECT_GUIDE.md — Project Guide Trading Journal v3.2
nodes.norm_label: project_guide.md — project guide trading journal v3.2

nodes.label: Trading Journal (producto)
nodes.rationale: Capa cognitiva sobre el broker que cambia el comportamiento del trader; la unidad de valor es el cambio de comportamiento verificado, no el trade guardado. v3 se construyó 'el cerebro antes que la piel': lógica pura primero, UI después.

nodes.label: Behavior Engine (insight → compromiso → regla → verificación → refuerzo)
nodes.rationale: Cierra el bucle entre detectar un patrón y cambiarlo de verdad, no solo señalarlo: convierte un insight en un compromiso medible que el sistema verifica al cierre de la ventana.
nodes.norm_label: behavior engine (insight → compromiso → regla → verificacion → refuerzo)

nodes.label: Intervention Engine (intervenciones en caliente)
nodes.rationale: Motor determinista (cascada de pérdidas, revancha, sobredimensionamiento, drawdown) que interrumpe en el momento del error, no en el post-mortem; el valor está en interrumpir cuando el error está ocurriendo. Aceptar la intervención puede crear una regla.

nodes.label: Memoria del coach (4 capas: episódica, semántica, identidad, mejora)
nodes.rationale: Un coach que olvida no sirve; uno que 'recuerda' alucinaciones es peligroso. Los patrones semánticos se confirman por datos, nunca por el LLM solo; la memoria es visible y editable.
nodes.norm_label: memoria del coach (4 capas: episodica, semantica, identidad, mejora)

nodes.label: Frontera anti-envenenamiento (memoria)
nodes.rationale: Garantiza que solo lo confirmado por datos entra a memoria de largo plazo.

nodes.label: ImprovementScore / Índice de mejora (0–100)
nodes.rationale: Una cifra honesta de '¿estoy mejorando?', descompuesta en drivers accionables (con régimen experimental y coste de indisciplina), no una métrica de vanidad; historizado día a día.

nodes.label: Reglas unificadas enforce/warn (Rule)
nodes.rationale: Una regla de bloqueo real (enforce) y un aviso (warn) son cosas distintas; antes vivían en dos modelos duplicados (Rule y Automation). Rule fusiona el viejo Automation con origen trazable (compromiso/insight).

nodes.label: Superficies ANALIZAR / PROTEGER / MEJORAR
nodes.rationale: Reorganizan la analítica institucional (S3), el motor de riesgo (S9) y la inteligencia de playbook (S10/S11) por lo que el trader hace, no por tablas; absorbe las 11 pantallas v2 sin perder dato. Preparación para el rediseño de navegación completo, aún no activado.

nodes.label: Feed HOY (TodayFeed)
nodes.rationale: Responde '¿qué muevo hoy para mejorar y no romperme?' cada mañana: señales priorizadas del día (compromisos, riesgo, refuerzos) con floor crítico.

nodes.label: Check-in pre-sesión (go/caution/no_go)
nodes.rationale: El estado mental (mood/energía/sueño) predice el desempeño; un go/no-go honesto antes de operar previene sesiones que no debieron abrirse.

nodes.label: Write-tools del coach con permiso (propose_rule / propose_commitment)
nodes.rationale: El sistema propone, el usuario dispone — nunca escritura sin confirmación explícita; las propuestas quedan inertes hasta que el trader las confirma.
nodes.norm_label: write-tools del coach con permiso (propose_rule / propose_commitment)

nodes.label: Digest cognitivo semanal ('Tu semana cognitiva')
nodes.rationale: El sistema busca proactivamente al trader sin incordiar cuando no hay nada que decir: 1 notificación semanal deduplicada y opt-outable con delta de mejora + compromisos + patrón nuevo.

nodes.label: RECAP_V3_V32 (detalle sprint a sprint, en historial git)
nodes.norm_label: recap_v3_v32 (detalle sprint a sprint, en historial git)

nodes.norm_label: bounded context cognitive/ (events, intervention, memory, coach)

nodes.norm_label: rules engine (domains/rules — runrules, fuente unica post-g2)

nodes.label: Formula Engine (lib/formulas — performance, win-rate, risk, drawdown, discipline, setup)

hyperedges.label: Cadena Insight→Compromiso→Regla→Seguimiento→Verificación→Refuerzo
Mecanismo de entrega de eventos (outbox durable + fast-path síncrono)
Frontera anti-poisoning de memoria (LLM propone, datos confirman)
Behavior Loop Rules Enforcement (loop → rules → blocking)
TD-018 Trade Service Extraction
AI Provider Resolution Flow (persisted key → env → none)
Cutover G2 de reglas (automations → rules)
Loop de mejora de comportamiento (insight → compromiso → regla → verificación → refuerzo → índice)
Compañero cognitivo v3.2 (quinto eje: memoria visible + cierre del bucle con el trader)
Prop-Firm Rule Engine Pipeline
Snapshot Preset Application Flow
POST-6 QA Closure Blockers (a/b/c)
Secuencia de tasks del retiro de automations (G2 fase 2)
Flujo de enforcement de reglas post-G2 (trades → runRules → evaluate/runAction)
Service layer de trades TD-018 (serializers, embedding, dashboard, read, write)
CI/CD antierrores pipeline
